basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Dental Technician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical, Para Medical and Non Medical Staff
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical, Para Medical and Non Medical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ECHS. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Medical, Para Medical and Non Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Medical Specialist, Radiologist, Medical Officer, and Dental Technician.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS, Post Graduate degree, MBBS, 10+2 with Science, Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic, Class I DORA course
qualification.details: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in the concerned specialty with 03 years of experience after Post Graduation. Radiologist: Post Graduate degree in the concerned specialty mentioned in section B of Schedule VI of the Central Health Services Regulation 1996 with 03 years of experience. Medical Officer: MBBS and 03 years of work experience after internship. Dental Technician: (i) Should have passed 10+2 with Science or equivalent from a recognized Board or Institution. (ii) Should have a two years Diploma in Dental Hygienist / Dental Mechanic Course Registered with Central / State Govt or Dental Council of India. (iii) Class I DORA course (Armed Forces). (iv) Minimum 03 years of experience in Dental Laboratory.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: Medical, Para Medical and Non Medical Staff
MD/MS, Post Graduate degree, MBBS, 10+2 with Science, Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Dental Mechanic, Class I DORA course

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in the concerned specialty with 03 years of experience after Post Graduation. Radiologist: Post Graduate degree in the concerned specialty mentioned in section B of Schedule VI of the Central Health Services Regulation 1996 with 03 years of experience. Medical Officer: MBBS and 03 years of work experience after internship. Dental Technician: (i) Should have passed 10+2 with Science or equivalent from a recognized Board or Institution. (ii) Should have a two years Diploma in Dental Hygienist / Dental Mechanic Course Registered with Central / State Govt or Dental Council of India. (iii) Class I DORA course (Armed Forces). (iv) Minimum 03 years of experience in Dental Laboratory.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical Staff positions under the ECHS Recruitment 2026 drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have at least 03 years of work experience after completing their internship.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Medical Specialist and Radiologist posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both the Medical Specialist and Radiologist positions is ₹130,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection process steps for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for ECHS Recruitment 2026 typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Practical Exam, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for ECHS Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the official ECHS website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the walk-in date for the interview for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The interview date for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 07th August 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is the recruitment taking place in?
faq.answer: The recruitment is taking place in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641018.
